generated_oml:
instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance PSU : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power Supply Unit for the crane system"
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for lifting containers"
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor data acquisition (swing angle, wind speed, and motor states)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, MotorStatesData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Arduino
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Arduino
]

instance MotorStatesData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Arduino
]

instance SwingAngleDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle data record"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed data record"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance MotorStatesDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor states data record"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorStatesData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data including crane states, trajectory traces, and validation metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, MotorStatesData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, PythonGantrylib, Grafana
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane created with Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for trajectory execution"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deployment"
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT Broker for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software for 3D modeling"
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureModelingService
]

instance KiCad : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Electronic design automation tool for hardware schematics"
    DTDFVocab:enables HardwareDesignService
]

instance SystemArchitectureModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling using Capella Arcadia"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemArchitectureInsight
]

instance SystemArchitectureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System architecture model for the gantry crane"
]

instance HardwareDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Hardware schematic design using KiCad"
    DTDFVocab:provides HardwareDesignInsight
]

instance HardwareDesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Hardware schematic design for the crane control system"
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Trajectory generation for optimal movement (no residual swinging)"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory for movement without residual swinging"
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane dynamics for trajectory execution"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results of crane dynamics"
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight, NotificationAction
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation metrics from comparison of real-time measurements and simulations"
]

instance NotificationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send notification to operators when validation thresholds are breached"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of trajectory traces"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection insights from time series classification"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from historical data logging"
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance GantryCraneDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin environment for the lab-scale gantry crane"
    base:contains CraneFrame, PSU, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet, Arduino, CADModel, KinematicModel, SimulationModel, TimeSeriesData, Docker, TimescaleDB, Grafana, EclipseMosquitto, PythonGantrylib, Fusion360, Capella, KiCad, TrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, SystemArchitectureModelingService, HardwareDesignService, SystemArchitectureInsight, HardwareDesignInsight, TrajectoryOptimizationInsight, SimulationInsight, ValidationInsight, NotificationAction, VisualizationInsight, FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are sent to the Control Application, which interfaces with the Physical Crane Interface to control motors and electromagnet movements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via C4 Model architecture with physical components (crane, interface, control app, logging, HMI) and digital components (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation, MQTT broker) interacting through MQTT communication and TimescaleDB data storage."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as-designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360, kinematic model) and as-operated stages (real-time data logging and validation during crane operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between real-time measurements and simulation outputs, comparing against predefined thresholds to ensure model fidelity; validation techniques reused from prior research on model validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for real-time signaling between services; SQL-based queries for TimescaleDB data access."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker containers for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; Python modules for other components, with docker compose for automated setup."
]
